finalization_metadata.story_title: House Foreign Affairs Committee’s dueling September 2024 Afghanistan withdrawal reports create a formal contradiction record

finalization_result.summary: QA passed with warnings; remaining findings are non-blocking and waived under editorial policy.

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: Suggestion-level QA finding; acceptable for finalization unless David chooses to polish manually.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: Spell out or convert to natural spoken phrasing if needed.

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: Non-blocking QA finding under finalization policy.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: Replace the opening public title with one that correctly orients listeners to the 2021 withdrawal and the September 2024 dueling-report accountability angle, without implying the withdrawal happened in 2024.

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: Suggestion-level QA finding; acceptable for finalization unless David chooses to polish manually.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: Use the approved unresolved closing line exactly: 'And now—you know more about what REALLY happened.'

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: Non-blocking QA finding under finalization policy.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: Keep the close centered on what the later record clarifies versus what remains institutionally contested, so the unresolved final line feels fully earned.

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: TTV warning affects delivery polish, not factual or editorial readiness.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: If needed, keep the first mention fully spelled out and use a natural spoken pattern consistently thereafter.

classified_qa_findings.policy_reason: Suggestion-level QA finding; acceptable for finalization unless David chooses to polish manually.
classified_qa_findings.recommended_fix: Use a title that signals this is about how the accountability record changed, not just a generic retrospective on a 'botched withdrawal.'
